race.comment: BALMORAL CASTLE (2) started favourite but couldn't recover from early interference and finished fourth when resuming over 1100m at Wyong last start. Clocked in two lengths behind the promising Plaintiff when second-up last prep. Good enough to fully test this field. BEAU STRADA (3) registered her sixth minor placing from eight starts last time out over this trip at Sale. Tricky draw but should run her usual honest race. PASIFAE (10) ran a better race at Sale last weekend and is in the mix on a seven-day back-up. MAJESTIC CHOICE (8) showed enough in her debut campaign to suggest she'll win races. Fitter for a couple of hit outs coming in and she won't be far away.
